stories.title: No. 1 Texas Opens at No. 4 Alabama — Game Day in Tuscaloosa

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Texas at No. 4 Alabama. Tonight. Rhoads Stadium.

6 PM CT on SEC Network+

First-ever SEC conference meeting between these programs.

Alabama leads the all-time series 7-2.

This is it. 🥎

#HookEm #RollTide #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Texas walks into Tuscaloosa tonight.

No. 1 in the country. Defending national champions. 8-1 in the SEC.

The A&M loss was a blip. Alabama will have something to say about that.

Game 1: 6 PM CT on SECN+.

#RollTide #HookEm #NCAASoftball

article.headline: No. 1 Texas at No. 4 Alabama: The Biggest Series in College Softball Opens Tonight

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

#### Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical)
- **Visual Description:** Action photo of a batter in a Texas or Alabama uniform mid-swing, stadium lights blazing behind her, crowd blurred in background
- **Photo Search Terms:**
  1. Reese Atwood Texas softball
  2. Bailey Hemphill Alabama softball
  3. Jordan Kilian Texas softball
  4. Emma Broadfoot Alabama softball
- **Text Overlay:**
  - Headline: "GAME DAY" (Bebas Neue, white, #FFFFFF)
  - Subtitle: "No. 1 Texas at No. 4 Alabama — Tonight 6 PM CT" (Montserrat, gold #FFD700)
  - Bar: Dark navy (#1A1A2E) semi-transparent, bottom 1/3
- **Composition Notes:** Landscape/action shot; text bar at bottom; stadium depth of field preferred

#### Article Hero (1200×630, 1.91:1 landscape)
- **Visual Description:** Wide shot of Rhoads Stadium exterior or a Texas pitcher in warm-up
- **Photo Search Terms:**
  1. Alabama Rhoads Stadium softball
  2. Longhorns softball pitcher 2026
- **Text Overlay:** Article headline variant, same color scheme

stories.title: Oklahoma vs Kentucky Opener — Wells Eyes HR Nos. 28-30

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells needs 3 home runs.

She's at 27. The NCAA freshman record is 30.

Tonight's HOME opener vs Kentucky at Love's Field starts at 6:30 PM CT.

The countdown is ON. 🥎

#BoomerSooner #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
No. 3 Oklahoma opens April at home tonight.

35-3. 8-1 in the SEC. 17-1 in March.

Kendall Wells needs 3 HRs to tie the NCAA freshman record.

Game time: 6:30 PM CT on SECN+. 👀

#BoomerSooner #SECSoftball #NCAASoftball

stories.title: No. 6 FSU Opens vs Notre Dame — 21-Game Streak on the Line

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Florida State has won 21 STRAIGHT.

Nation's longest active win streak. Torres is batting .615.

Tonight vs Notre Dame at 6 PM ET — ACC Network Extra.

The Irish are 7-30 all-time against FSU.

This Seminoles team is DEALING. 🔥

#Noles #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Isa Torres Is Having the Greatest Batting Season in Recent Memory

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Isa Torres: .615 batting average.

She leads all of Division I softball.

Last 15 games: 37-for-52 (.712). 5 HR. 22 RBI.

She set the NCAA record for consecutive hits — 16 straight.

#Noles #NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: Washington Is Undefeated in the Big Ten — 20-Game Win Streak

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Washington softball: 30-6. 20-game win streak.

12-0 in the Big Ten — only undefeated conference team.

They combined for a no-hitter vs Iowa. Now heading to Stanford.

Most slept-on team in the country. 👀

#NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball #Softball

stories.title: Texas Tech at No. 2 — 35-2 and NiJaree Canady Is Rolling

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech: 35-2. No. 2 nationally. 11-1 in the Big 12.

Nine points behind No. 1 Texas.

23 run-rule wins. NiJaree Canady at the helm.

If Texas loses this weekend — Tech moves to No. 1.

#WreckEm #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: The SEC Race Is Real — Three Teams Within One Game of First

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Current SEC softball standings:

Texas — 8-1
Oklahoma — 8-1
Alabama — 7-2

Tonight: Texas is AT Alabama.

Three teams. One game separating them all.

The SEC race is as real as it gets. 🥎

#SECSoftball #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball
